title: Foundations section (Pattern H hierarchical derive)
description: Per-leaf or per-branch JSON emitted by scripts/foundations/derive-foundations.js. The Pattern H tree mirrors heading paths from foundations/src/foundations.md. Leaves carry blocks[]; branches (_index.json) carry children[]. Schema is permissive (additionalProperties:true) because the derive script may add new metadata fields without breaking the contract.

_schema_version.description: Schema version for the section JSON shape. Currently 1. Bumps require coordinated plugin-side reader updates.

id.description: Slash-separated path identifier for the section (matches heading slugs). Empty string for the root _index.

title.description: Human-readable section title, as authored in the MD heading.

path.description: Ordered slug segments from root to this section. Empty array for the root. Mirrors the directory layout under foundations/dist/.

order.description: Sibling ordering hint (1-based) reflecting authored heading order in the source MD. Auto-assigned by derive. Only present on child-list entries; per-leaf files inherit ordering from their parent _index.json children[].

parent.description: Slug of the parent section, or null for the root _index.

anchors.description: Heading anchors for cross-document linking. Each level (h1..h4) carries the slug used in MD anchor links.

source.description: Provenance — points back to the authored source MD + (for leaves) the line range.

file.description: Path to the source MD file (repo-relative).

startLine.description: Line number where this section's heading appears in the source MD. Omitted on the root _index.

endLine.description: Line number where this section ends (before the next sibling/parent heading). Omitted on the root _index.

body.description: Section's prose body (markdown). Empty when the section is purely structural.
examples: Use the spacing scale for all margin and padding values.

blocks.description: Structured blocks extracted from the section (tables, code fences, lists). Leaves carry blocks[]; branches typically don't. Each block has a type discriminator.

type.description: Block kind. Common values: table, code, list, paragraph.

children.description: Child section index entries (id + title + order). Present only on _index.json files. Sibling files under the same dir provide full content per child.

_meta.description: Auto-generation marker. Authors must not hand-edit derived files; this object documents that.

examples.do_not_edit: Edit the source MD; CI regenerates this file.
